question: Create a `Product` class with `productID`, `name`, and `price`. Overload the `==` operator to compare two `Product` objects based solely on their `productID`.

test_cases.input: Standard product creation and comprehensive comparisons, including temporary objects.
test_cases.expected:
ID: 101, Name: Gaming Laptop, Price: 1500
ID: 102, Name: Ergonomic Mouse, Price: 50
ID: 101, Name: Mechanical Keyboard, Price: 120
ID: 103, Name: 4K Monitor, Price: 450

--- Comparisons ---
p1 (ID 101) == p2 (ID 102): false
p1 (ID 101) == p3 (ID 101): true
p2 (ID 102) == p4 (ID 103): false
p3 (ID 101) == p1 (ID 101): true
p1 (ID 101) == Product(101, "Temporary Item", 10.0): true
p1 (ID 101) == Product(999, "Another Temp", 10.0): false
